title: Parent-Root Reevaluation Handoff Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining 2026-04-22 parent-root reevaluation handoff family so those selection records no longer read like a live packet queue for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: Packets 109 through 168 demoted the individual draft-publication handoff records, but the four 2026-04-22 parent-root reevaluation handoffs still preserve queue-selection language without the equivalent current-routing treatment used elsewhere in the residue-retirement lane. The truthful next move is to normalize those four top sections directly while keeping the broader publication/checkpoint handoff family separate in Packet 174.
execution_scope: Retitle the four targeted 2026-04-22 parent-root reevaluation handoffs as historical parent-root selection records.
Add explicit do-not-use and current-routing blocks at the top of those handoffs.
Preserve the detailed queue-evaluation evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical selection record wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad archive rewrite beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
publication or checkpoint handoff normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted reevaluation handoff now leads as a historical parent-root selection record instead of a live queue-selection step.
Each targeted handoff now includes explicit current-routing text for the standalone repo boundary.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves publication/checkpoint handoff normalization separate if still untouched.
next_action: Execute this packet as a separate residue-family slice, then reassess whether Packet 174 remains the next truthful adjacent handoff-demotion lane.
